div1.entryFree: Sew or Sow, vb. to work with a needle and thread; absol.: Gent. III, 1, 307. Tit. II, 4, 43. Hml. II, 1, 77. Per. IV, 6, 194. Trans.: H4A II, 4, 130. Cor. I, 3, 55. Oth. III, 4, 72. With up: the sleeves should be cut out and --ed up again, Shr. IV, 3, 148. With an accus. denoting the effect: s. me in the skirts of it and beat me to death with a bottom of brown thread, Shr. IV, 3, 137. and in a tedious sampler --ed her mind, Per. II, 4, 39.
